name: Mushak oshirish (2500 kaloriya)
plan: 💪 Mushak massa oshirish ovqatlanish (2500 kcal) 🌅 Nonushta (600 kcal) • 4 ta tuxum (omlet yoki qaynatilgan) • 3 bo'lak to'liq donli non + yog' • 1 kosa sut + protein kukuni • 1 banan 🍎 Oraliq 1 (300 kcal) • Protein shake (30g protein) • 1 hovuch yong'oq • 1 ta meva 🍽 Tushlik (800 kcal) • 250g qizil go'sht/tovuq • 2 laganda qo'ng'ir guruch • Salat + zaytun moyi • 1 ta kartoshka 🍊 Oraliq 2 (300 kcal) • Yeryong'oq yog'i + non • Yoki protein bar + sut 🌙 Kechki ovqat (500 kcal) • 200g baliq yoki tovuq • Makaron yoki guruch • Sabzavotlar 🌜 Uxlashdan oldin (200 kcal) • Casein protein shake • Yoki kurka pishloq + yong'oq 💡 Maslahatlar: • Kuniga 2-2.5g protein / kg tana vazni • Muntazam ovqatlaning (har 3 soatda) • Yetarli uxlang (8+ soat) • Mushaklar dam olishda o'sadi! • Premium bilan individual kalkulyatsiya va reja! 💎
